message.content:
You are test-agent for task T4: M2-CRUD-API — TaskService + TaskController + Exception Handling.

INPUT (Read these files FIRST):
- PLAN: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/m1-m2-m3-m6/2026-03-06-PLAN.md
- CONTRACT: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/m1-m2-m3-m6/2026-03-06-CONTRACT.md
- Spec: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/docs/specs/M2-task-crud.md
- READONLY context (already implemented):
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/Task.java
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/TaskStatus.java
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/repository/TaskRepository.java
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/TaskResponse.java
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/CreateTaskRequest.java
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/User.java
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/security/JwtTokenProvider.java
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/security/JwtAuthFilter.java
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/config/SecurityConfig.java
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/repository/UserRepository.java
- Test directory: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/
- pom.xml: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/pom.xml
- Test config: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/resources/application.yml
- Log output: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/m1-m2-m3-m6/logs/test-agent-4.log.md

Task description:
Build Task CRUD service and controller layer: TaskService, TaskController, UpdateTaskRequest DTO, PageResponse DTO, GlobalExceptionHandler.

ALLOWED implementation files (Worker will create these — you write tests for them):
1. service/TaskService.java — create (set createdBy from JWT), getById (exclude deleted→404), update, softDelete, list (paginated + keyword + priority filter)
2. controller/TaskController.java — POST /api/tasks, GET /api/tasks/{id}, PUT /api/tasks/{id}, DELETE /api/tasks/{id}, GET /api/tasks
3. dto/UpdateTaskRequest.java — title (required, 1-200), description (optional, max 5000), priority (optional)
4. dto/PageResponse.java — content, page, size, totalElements, totalPages
5. exception/GlobalExceptionHandler.java — @RestControllerAdvice, handles validation (400), not found (404), duplicates (409)

Acceptance criteria (M2 spec, 16 ACs):
- AC1: POST /api/tasks with valid token + title/description/priority → 201 + full task (id, createdBy, createdAt)
- AC2: POST /api/tasks without priority → priority defaults to MEDIUM
- AC3: POST /api/tasks without title or empty title → 400
- AC4: GET /api/tasks/{id} existing → 200 + full task
- AC5: GET /api/tasks/{id} non-existent → 404
- AC6: PUT /api/tasks/{id} with updates → 200 + updated task, updatedAt has value
- AC7: DELETE /api/tasks/{id} → 204 No Content, task soft-deleted
- AC8: Soft-deleted task NOT in GET /api/tasks list
- AC9: GET /api/tasks/{id} for soft-deleted → 404
- AC10: GET /api/tasks no params → 200 paginated, default page=0, size=20, sort=createdAt desc
- AC11: GET /api/tasks?keyword=xxx → only title-matching tasks (case-insensitive)
- AC12: GET /api/tasks?priority=HIGH → only HIGH priority tasks
- AC13: GET /api/tasks?page=1&size=5 → correct page 2 data
- AC14: Any task endpoint without token → 401
- AC15: title >200 chars → 400
- AC16: description >5000 chars → 400

TEST DESIGN:
- Use @SpringBootTest + @AutoConfigureMockMvc for integration tests (full stack including security)
- For authenticated requests: You need a valid JWT. Read JwtTokenProvider from READONLY files to understand how to generate a test token. Register a user first, or directly use JwtTokenProvider to create a token in test setup.
- IMPORTANT: Read User.java, UserRepository.java, and JwtTokenProvider.java to set up proper auth context in tests
- Create a test helper method that: creates a User in DB, generates a JWT for that user, returns the token
- Each AC should have its own test method
- Test pagination with multiple tasks
- Test keyword search case-insensitivity

IMPORTANT:
- Read ALL READONLY files first to understand exact APIs, field names, and existing patterns
- Use JUnit 5 + Spring Boot Test
- Tests MUST fail when run (TaskService, TaskController, etc. don't exist yet)
- Do NOT create implementation files

OUTPUT: Write test files, return list of paths created.

LOG WRITING (append-only):
[LOG] task=T4 | event=test-design-start | strategy=red-green,boundary,error,contract
[LOG] task=T4 | event=test-design-complete | test-files={list} | test-count={number}

content.content:
1→[SECTION] Project Overview
     2→[GOAL] Implement TaskFlow M1 (Auth) + M2 (Task CRUD) + M3 (State Machine) + M6 (Task List Page) — full-stack from entity to frontend
     3→[ARCH] Spring Boot 3.2.3 + Java 17 + H2 in-memory + JPA + Spring Security + JJWT 0.12.5 | Vue 3.4 + Pinia 2.1 + axios + vue-router + Vite 5 + Vitest + TypeScript | stateless JWT auth | soft-delete pattern | state machine in enum
     4→[NAMING] Java: camelCase fields, PascalCase classes, lowercase packages (com.taskflow.*) | Vue: PascalCase components, camelCase props/methods, kebab-case file events | TS: PascalCase interfaces, camelCase fields
     5→[CONSTRAINTS] M4/M5 not implemented — M6 uses placeholder for assignee/tags | H2 in-memory (create-drop) | JWT secret in application.yml | all /api/** require auth except /api/auth/** and /h2-console/**
     6→[SHARED] config/SecurityConfig.java | entity/Task.java | service/TaskService.java | controller/TaskController.java | exception/GlobalExceptionHandler.java
     7→
     8→[SECTION] Standards
     9→[SOURCE] none
    10→[OVERRIDE] follow-actual-code
    11→
    12→[SECTION] Specs
    13→[SPEC] id=S1 | name=M1-Authentication | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M1-auth.md
    14→[SPEC] id=S2 | name=M2-Task-CRUD | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M2-task-crud.md
    15→[SPEC] id=S3 | name=M3-Task-State-Machine | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M3-task-state-machine.md
    16→[SPEC] id=S4 | name=M6-Task-List-Page | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M6-task-list-page.md
    17→
    18→[SECTION] Task Dependency Graph
    19→[DEP] T1 → T2 → T4 → T5 (backend chain)
    20→[DEP] T3 → T4 (entity feeds into service)
    21→[DEP] T6 → T7 (frontend chain)
    22→[DEP] T1,T3,T6 are independent (wave 1, max 3 concurrent)
    23→
    24→[SECTION] Execution Strategy
    25→[STRATEGY] parallel-per-task | max-concurrent=3
    26→[WAVE] 1: T1(M1-Foundation), T3(M2+M3-Entity), T6(M6-Frontend-Infra) — all independent
    27→[WAVE] 2: T2(M1-Auth-API) after T1, T7(M6-Frontend-UI) after T6
    28→[WAVE] 3: T4(M2-CRUD-API) after T1+T3
    29→[WAVE] 4: T5(M3-Status-API) after T4
    30→

1→[SECTION] API Contract
     2→[VERSION] 1
     3→
     4→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/register | req={username:string(3-50,alphanumeric+underscore),password:string(min8),displayName:string(1-100)} | res=201:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=400,409
     5→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/login | req={username:string,password:string} | res=200:{token:string,expiresIn:long} | errors=401
     6→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/auth/me | req=none | res=200:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=401
     7→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/tasks | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string(max5000,optional),priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW,default:MEDIUM)} | res=201:{id:long,title:string,description:string,priority:string,status:string,createdBy:long,createdAt:datetime,updatedAt:datetime?} | errors=400,401
     8→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none | res=200:{id:long,title:string,description:string,priority:string,status:string,createdBy:long,createdAt:datetime,updatedAt:datetime?} | errors=401,404
     9→[ENDPOINT] method=PUT | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string(max5000,optional),priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW,optional)} | res=200:{same-as-get} | errors=400,401,404
    10→[ENDPOINT] method=DELETE | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none | res=204:no-content | errors=401,404
    11→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks | req=query:{page:int(default:0),size:int(default:20),sort:string(default:createdAt,desc),keyword:string?,priority:enum?} | res=200:{content:TaskResponse[],page:int,size:int,totalElements:long,totalPages:int} | errors=401
    12→[ENDPOINT] method=PATCH | path=/api/tasks/{id}/status | req={status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED)} | res=200:{same-as-task-response} | errors=400,401,404
    13→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id}/transitions | req=none | res=200:{currentStatus:string,availableTransitions:string[]} | errors=401,404
    14→
    15→[SECTION] Shared Types
    16→[TYPE] name=TaskResponse | fields=id:long,title:string,description:string,priority:Priority,status:TaskStatus,createdBy:long,createdAt:LocalDateTime,updatedAt:LocalDateTime?
    17→[TYPE] name=UserResponse | fields=id:long,username:string,displayName:string
    18→[TYPE] name=PageResponse<T> | fields=content:T[],page:int,size:int,totalElements:long,totalPages:int
    19→[TYPE] name=Priority | fields=enum:HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW
    20→[TYPE] name=TaskStatus | fields=enum:TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED
    21→
    22→[SECTION] State Machine Rules
    23→[TRANSITION] TODO -> IN_PROGRESS
    24→[TRANSITION] IN_PROGRESS -> TODO
    25→[TRANSITION] IN_PROGRESS -> DONE
    26→[TRANSITION] DONE -> CLOSED
    27→[TERMINAL] CLOSED (no outgoing transitions)
    28→
    29→[SECTION] Error Format
    30→[FORMAT] status:int,message:string,errors?:string[]
    31→
    32→[SECTION] Amendment Log
    33→

1→# M2: Task CRUD
     2→
     3→## 需求描述
     4→
     5→本模組提供任務（Task）的完整 CRUD 操作，包含建立、讀取、更新與刪除功能，以及支援分頁查詢、關鍵字搜尋與篩選條件的任務列表端點。所有端點皆需要通過 JWT 身份驗證。
     6→
     7→每個任務包含標題、描述、優先級等欄位。建立任務時自動記錄建立者（createdBy）與建立時間（createdAt），更新時自動記錄更新時間（updatedAt）。刪除採用軟刪除策略，設置 deleted 標記而非實際從資料庫移除記錄。
     8→
     9→任務列表支援分頁、排序、依標題關鍵字搜尋，以及依優先級篩選，確保大量資料時的查詢效能與使用者體驗。
    10→
    11→## 驗收標準
    12→
    13→- AC1: 攜帶有效 Token 呼叫 POST /api/tasks 帶入 title、description、priority，回傳 HTTP 201 且回應包含完整任務物件（含自動產生的 id、createdBy、createdAt）
    14→- AC2: 建立任務時未帶 priority，任務的 priority 預設為 MEDIUM
    15→- AC3: 建立任務時未帶 title 或 title 為空字串，回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request
    16→- AC4: 攜帶有效 Token 呼叫 GET /api/tasks/{id} 帶入存在的任務 ID，回傳 HTTP 200 且回應包含完整任務物件
    17→- AC5: 呼叫 GET /api/tasks/{id} 帶入不存在的任務 ID，回傳 HTTP 404 Not Found
    18→- AC6: 攜帶有效 Token 呼叫 PUT /api/tasks/{id} 帶入更新欄位，回傳 HTTP 200 且回應反映更新後的內容，updatedAt 欄位有值
    19→- AC7: 攜帶有效 Token 呼叫 DELETE /api/tasks/{id}，回傳 HTTP 204 No Content，該任務被軟刪除
    20→- AC8: 軟刪除的任務不出現在 GET /api/tasks 的列表查詢結果中
    21→- AC9: 呼叫 GET /api/tasks/{id} 存取已軟刪除的任務，回傳 HTTP 404 Not Found
    22→- AC10: 呼叫 GET /api/tasks 不帶任何參數，回傳 HTTP 200 且回應為分頁格式，預設 page=0、size=20、按 createdAt 降序排列
    23→- AC11: 呼叫 GET /api/tasks?keyword=xxx，僅回傳 title 包含該關鍵字的任務（不區分大小寫）
    24→- AC12: 呼叫 GET /api/tasks?priority=HIGH，僅回傳 priority 為 HIGH 的任務
    25→- AC13: 呼叫 GET /api/tasks?page=1&size=5，回傳正確的第二頁資料（跳過前 5 筆）
    26→- AC14: 不攜帶 Token 呼叫任何任務端點，回傳 HTTP 401 Unauthorized
    27→- AC15: title 超過 200 字元時，回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request
    28→- AC16: description 超過 5000 字元時，回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request
    29→
    30→## API 端點
    31→
    32→### POST /api/tasks
    33→- 說明: 建立新任務
    34→- Request Header: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
    35→- Request Body:
    36→  ```json
    37→  {
    38→    "title": "string (required, 1-200 chars)",
    39→    "description": "string (optional, max 5000 chars)",
    40→    "priority": "string (optional, enum: HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW, default: MEDIUM)"
    41→  }
    42→  ```
    43→- Success Response: 201 Created
    44→  ```json
    45→  {
    46→    "id": "long",
    47→    "title": "string",
    48→    "description": "string",
    49→    "priority": "HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW",
    50→    "status": "TODO",
    51→    "createdBy": "long (user id)",
    52→    "createdAt": "ISO 8601 datetime",
    53→    "updatedAt": "ISO 8601 datetime or null"
    54→  }
    55→  ```
    56→- Error Responses: 400 (validation failed), 401 (unauthorized)
    57→
    58→### GET /api/tasks/{id}
    59→- 說明: 取得單一任務詳情
    60→- Request Header: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
    61→- Path Parameter: id (long) — 任務 ID
    62→- Success Response: 200 OK（回應格式同上）
    63→- Error Responses: 401 (unauthorized), 404 (not found or soft-deleted)
    64→
    65→### PUT /api/tasks/{id}
    66→- 說明: 更新任務內容
    67→- Request Header: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
    68→- Path Parameter: id (long) — 任務 ID
    69→- Request Body:
    70→  ```json
    71→  {
    72→    "title": "string (required, 1-200 chars)",
    73→    "description": "string (optional, max 5000 chars)",
    74→    "priority": "string (optional, enum: HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW)"
    75→  }
    76→  ```
    77→- Success Response: 200 OK（回應格式同建立，updatedAt 更新）
    78→- Error Responses: 400 (validation failed), 401 (unauthorized), 404 (not found)
    79→
    80→### DELETE /api/tasks/{id}
    81→- 說明: 軟刪除任務
    82→- Request Header: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
    83→- Path Parameter: id (long) — 任務 ID
    84→- Success Response: 204 No Content
    85→- Error Responses: 401 (unauthorized), 404 (not found)
    86→
    87→### GET /api/tasks
    88→- 說明: 分頁查詢任務列表（支援搜尋與篩選）
    89→- Request Header: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
    90→- Query Parameters:
    91→  - `page` (int, optional, default: 0) — 頁碼，從 0 開始
    92→  - `size` (int, optional, default: 20) — 每頁筆數
    93→  - `sort` (string, optional, default: "createdAt,desc") — 排序欄位與方向
    94→  - `keyword` (string, optional) — 依標題搜尋的關鍵字（不區分大小寫，模糊比對）
    95→  - `priority` (string, optional, enum: HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW) — 依優先級篩選
    96→- Success Response: 200 OK
    97→  ```json
    98→  {
    99→    "content": [{ "id": 1, "title": "...", "..." : "..." }],
   100→    "page": 0,
   101→    "size": 20,
   102→    "totalElements": 100,
   103→    "totalPages": 5
   104→  }
   105→  ```
   106→- Error Responses: 401 (unauthorized)
   107→
   108→## 業務規則
   109→
   110→- BR1: title 為必填欄位，長度限制 1-200 字元
   111→- BR2: description 為選填欄位，最大長度 5000 字元
   112→- BR3: priority 為列舉值，僅接受 HIGH、MEDIUM、LOW 三種值，未指定時預設為 MEDIUM
   113→- BR4: 建立任務時自動從 JWT Token 中擷取 createdBy（使用者 ID），不接受前端傳入
   114→- BR5: 建立任務時自動記錄 createdAt 為伺服器當前時間
   115→- BR6: 更新任務時自動記錄 updatedAt 為伺服器當前時間
   116→- BR7: 刪除為軟刪除（設置 deleted=true 或 deletedAt 時間戳），不實際移除資料庫記錄
   117→- BR8: 所有列表查詢自動排除已軟刪除的任務
   118→- BR9: 分頁預設值：page=0、size=20、sort=createdAt,desc
   119→- BR10: 新建任務的初始狀態為 TODO（由 M3 模組定義）
   120→
   121→## 相依模組
   122→
   123→- 依賴: M1 (Authentication) — 所有端點需要 JWT 身份驗證
   124→- 被依賴: M3 (Task State Machine)、M4 (Tag System)、M6 (Task Filter)、M7 (Dashboard)
   125→

content.text:
Now I have all the information needed. Let me check if the SecurityConfig has an `exceptionHandling` for 401 responses, since I see the tests expect 401 status.

Looking at the SecurityConfig, I notice it does NOT have an explicit `exceptionHandling` clause with `authenticationEntryPoint`. The default Spring Security behavior when using stateless session and no form login is to return 403 Forbidden. However, the existing SecurityConfigIntegrationTest expects 401 for unauthenticated requests, so there might be default behavior handling it. Let me check more carefully.

Actually, looking at the SecurityConfig again — it uses `.sessionManagement(session -> session.sessionCreationPolicy(SessionCreationPolicy.STATELESS))` and doesn't configure any authentication entry point. Spring Security's default `Http403ForbiddenEntryPoint` would return 403. But the existing tests pass checking for 401. This means either the default behavior returns 401 in this Spring Boot 3.2.3 version, or there's something else going on. Let me check if there's a custom entry point configured somewhere.
The SecurityConfig does have exception handling with 401 response, but lines 37-39 weren't in my read output. Let me re-read the full SecurityConfig.
Good, the SecurityConfig has the `.exceptionHandling` with 401 Unauthorized entry point. Now I have complete understanding of the codebase. Let me also verify the log directory exists.

content.text:
Good. Now I have a complete picture. Let me create the test file for T4: M2-CRUD-API. I need to write integration tests using `@SpringBootTest + @AutoConfigureMockMvc` that cover all 16 ACs.

Key observations from the READONLY files:
- `JwtTokenProvider.generateToken(Long userId)` generates a JWT with user ID as subject
- `JwtAuthFilter` extracts the token from `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header and sets `UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken` with `userId` as principal
- `SecurityConfig` returns 401 for unauthenticated requests
- `User` entity has id, username, password, displayName, createdAt
- `Task` entity has id, title, description, priority (enum HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW), status (TaskStatus), createdBy, createdAt, updatedAt, deleted
- `CreateTaskRequest` has title (@NotBlank, @Size 1-200), description (@Size max 5000), priority (default MEDIUM)
- `TaskResponse` has id, title, description, priority, status, createdBy, createdAt, updatedAt
- `TaskRepository` has custom queries for pagination with deleted/keyword/priority filters

Here is the summary of work completed.

---

**Task T4 Test Design Complete — M2 CRUD API**

**5 test files created, 74 total test methods:**

1. **`C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/controller/TaskControllerIntegrationTest.java`** (36 tests)
   - Full-stack integration tests using `@SpringBootTest` + `@AutoConfigureMockMvc`
   - Covers all 16 ACs (AC1-AC16) with dedicated `@Nested` classes
   - Auth setup: creates a `User` in DB, generates JWT via `JwtTokenProvider.generateToken(userId)`, passes as `Authorization: Bearer` header
   - AC1: POST with valid token returns 201 with full task object (id, createdBy, createdAt)
   - AC2: POST without priority defaults to MEDIUM
   - AC3: POST without/empty/blank title returns 400
   - AC4: GET existing task returns 200 with full object
   - AC5: GET non-existent returns 404
   - AC6: PUT updates returns 200 with updatedAt; PUT non-existent returns 404
   - AC7: DELETE returns 204, verifies soft-delete in DB; DELETE non-existent returns 404
   - AC8: Soft-deleted tasks excluded from list
   - AC9: GET soft-deleted task returns 404
   - AC10: Default pagination (page=0, size=20, createdAt desc)
   - AC11: Keyword search case-insensitive, empty results for non-match
   - AC12: Priority filter returns only matching
   - AC13: Custom page/size pagination (page=1&size=5)
   - AC14: All 5 endpoints without token return 401
   - AC15: Title >200 chars returns 400; boundary test at exactly 200
   - AC16: Description >5000 chars returns 400; boundary test at exactly 5000
   - Additional: combined keyword+priority filter, error response format validation

2. **`C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/service/TaskServiceTest.java`** (17 tests)
   - Tests `TaskService` methods: `create`, `getById`, `update`, `softDelete`, `list`
   - Verifies createdBy set from userId, default priority, initial status TODO
   - Verifies getById throws for non-existent and soft-deleted tasks
   - Verifies update sets updatedAt, throws for non-existent
   - Verifies list with keyword, priority, combined filters, and pagination

3. **`C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/dto/UpdateTaskRequestValidationTest.java`** (11 tests)
   - Bean Validation tests: title required (null/empty/blank fail), size boundaries (200 ok, 201 fail)
   - Description optional, size boundary (5000 ok, 5001 fail)
   - Priority optional, all enum values accepted

4. **`C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/dto/PageResponseTest.java`** (6 tests)
   - Tests generic `PageResponse<T>` DTO: content, page, size, totalElements, totalPages, empty content

5. **`C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/exception/GlobalExceptionHandlerTest.java`** (4 tests)
   - Verifies error response format `{status, message, errors?}` for 400 and 404
   - Validates multiple validation errors handled
